input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Hoplite documentation commonly demonstrates YAML/JSON/HOCON/TOML config files, but those formats require separate hoplite-* modules. For hoplite-core-only coverage, tests should use MapPropertySource, PropsPropertySource, .properties resources, or core APIs rather than assuming YAML/JSON parsing is available.

Hoplite 3 changes default environment-variable behavior: EnvironmentVariablesPropertySource is now part of the default sources and can read process environment. Tests that use ConfigLoaderBuilder.default() should avoid depending on ambient CI environment values; prefer explicit/in-memory sources for deterministic assertions.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No deterministic setup is required for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1. The resolved artifact depends only on Kotlin stdlib/reflect and kotlinx-coroutines, and the core jar includes in-memory/property-based sources, default decoders, default mappers, and the built-in Java properties parser, so meaningful coverage is reachable without Docker, extra Maven modules, or required environment/system properties.
